articles.description: In an unprecedented surge, Litecoin, a cryptocurrency that is often referred to as the silver to Bitcoin’s gold, has registered an astounding 167 million transactions as its use for payments grew to a new all-time high. The cryptocurrency has been seeing its price rise significantly over the last few days amid a wider cryptocurrency market […]
